Margaret of Scotland (1193–1259) was a princess of Scotland and an English noblewoman.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre於1211年5月5日出生在法國奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特時，她的父親Archambaud VIII de Bourbon21歲，母親Alix Guigone de Forez29歲。她於1220年5月與Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈帕格結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1256年4月12日在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉布利享年44歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布可萊瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre于1211年5月5日出生在法国奧維阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特时，她的父亲Archambaud VIII de Bourbon21岁，母亲Alix Guigone de Forez29岁。她于1220年5月与Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈帕格结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1256年4月12日在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉布利享年44岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布可萊瓦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre was born on 5 May 1211, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, France, her father, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, was 21 and her mother, Alix Guigone de Forez, was 29. She married Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre in May 1220, in Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 12 April 1256, in Brie, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 44, and was buried in Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre est née le 5 mai 1211, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, France, son père, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alix Guigone de Forez, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre en mai 1220, à Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 avril 1256, à Brie, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre am 5. Mai 1211 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archambaud VIII de Bourbon 21 und ihre Mutter Alix Guigone de Forez 29. Sie hat im Mai 1220 in Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. April 1256 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Brie, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre è nata il il 5 maggio 1211 nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, sua padre, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Alix Guigone de Forez, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre nel maggio 1220, nel Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 aprile 1256, nel Brie, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarreが1211年5月5日にフランスアウバーグンアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトで生まれた時，父Archambaud VIII de Bourbonは21歳，母Alix Guigone de Forezは29歳であった。1220年5月にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャンプアグンでThibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1256年4月12日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインブリーで44歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベクレイルヴァウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre(이)가 1211년 5월 5일 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archambaud VIII de Bourbon(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix Guigone de Forez(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1220년 5월 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 챔파그니에서 Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1256년 4월 12일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 브리에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 클레이르바스에 묻혔다.

mn.5 May 1211–12 April 1256: 1211 оны Тавдугаар сарын 5–1256 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 12

pt.5 May 1211–12 April 1256: 5 de maio de 1211–12 de abril de 1256
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre nasceu em 5 de maio de 1211, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alix Guigone de Forez, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre em maio de 1220, em Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de abril de 1256, em Brie, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre родилась 5 мая 1211 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция, её отцу по имени Archambaud VIII de Bourbon было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alix Guigone de Forez, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre май 1220 г. в местности чампагн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 12 апреля 1256 г. в местности бри, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности клеирваукс, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

sm.desde 1232 hasta 1253: mai le 1232 e o'o I le 1253

es.5 May 1211–12 April 1256: 5 de mayo de 1211–12 de abril de 1256
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Bourbon Reine Consort de Navarre nació el 5 de mayo de 1211, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Archambaud VIII de Bourbon, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Alix Guigone de Forez, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre en mayo de 1220, en Champagne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de abril de 1256, en Brie, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Clairvaux, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
